flags.message: CourtListener MCP server was down for this cell: every tool call failed with 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store.' The prediction proceeded on the provisioned snapshot/petition plus fedcourts corpus tooling; impact on this cell is low (routine pro se IFP cert posture), but other cells in this fan-out likely hit the same outage.

The committed metrics/statpack.md has no 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section, though the predict prompt directs predictors to anchor on it; only the overall/by-court/by-Term cuts are present, and every recent Term shows 0 resolved cases. Used the blended SCOTUS resolved cut (granted 1.4%) plus fedcourts query --era 2020s priors instead.
